title: مراكز بيانات في الفضاء.. هل يتحقق حلم إيلون ماسك؟
summary: يراهن إيلون ماسك على نقل المعركة المقبلة للذكاء الاصطناعي خارج حدود الأرض، عبر فكرة ثورية تقوم على إنشاء مراكز بيانات في الفضاء.. فهل ينجح؟

title: Backwards heat shows laws of thermodynamics may need a quantum update
summary: We are used to heat flowing from hot objects to cool ones, and never the other way round, but now researchers have found it is possible to pull off this trick in the strange realm of quantum mechanics

title: Why self-expansion is the key to long-lasting love and friendship
summary: A growing body of psychological research shows that the best relationships – romantic or otherwise – come with a feeling of personal growth. Columnist David Robson explores the evidence-backed ways to broaden our horizons and connect more deeply with our loves, our friends and ourselves

title: Nepal and Northern India are not overdue for a huge earthquake
summary: Many researchers thought that earthquakes in the Himalayas recur at regular intervals – but an analysis of sediment cores has shown they are largely random, and the region has seen far more than we previously realised

title: What to read this week: Bonded by Evolution by Paul Eastwick
summary: We are told we need cynical strategies to "play" the dating game, but the science says this is totally wrong. David Robson enjoys an evidence-based takedown from psychologist Paul Eastwick

title: الإمارات وسويسرا تؤسسان لجنة اقتصادية مشتركة لتعزيز التجارة
summary: اتفقت وزارة التجارة الخارجية في دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة، ووزارة الشؤون الاقتصادية والتعليم والبحث العلمي في الاتحاد السويسري، على تأسيس اللجنة الاقتصادية المشتركة بين البلدين، وذلك بهدف تعزيز التعاون التجاري والاستثماري، وتسهيل تدفقات الاستثمار، وتنمية التبادل التجاري.

title: Physicists warn of 'catastrophic' impact from UK science cuts
summary: Science funding cuts in the UK are expected to be a "devastasting blow" for physics research, affecting international projects such as particle detection experiments at CERN

title: Why did SpaceX just apply to launch 1 million satellites?
summary: SpaceX says it wants to deploy an astronomical number of data centres in orbit to supply power for artificial intelligence, but the proposal might not be entirely serious

title: How to live a meaningful life, according to science
summary: The meaning of life has puzzled philosophers for millennia, but new research suggests it could be as simple as lending a helping hand

title: A huge cloud of dark matter may be lurking near our solar system
summary: For the first time, researchers have found what seems to be a cloud of dark matter about 60 million times the mass of the sun in our galactic neighbourhood

title: The best new science fiction books of February 2026
summary: We pick the sci-fi novels we’re most looking forward to reading this month, from a new Brandon Sanderson to the latest from Makana Yamamoto

title: Our verdict on Annie Bot: This novel about a sex robot split opinions
summary: Members of the New Scientist Book Club give their take on Sierra Greer's award-winning science-fiction novel Annie Bot, our read for February – and the needle swings wildly from positive to negative
